parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
resourceContainers 
| where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
| join kind = inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on $left.subscriptionId == $right.subscriptionId
| project resourceGroup, name, subscriptionId, subscriptionName
| join kind = inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
    | distinct resourceGroup, subscriptionId
) on resourceGroup, subscriptionId
| project value = resourceGroup, label = name, group = subscriptionName

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend joinID = toupper(id)
| project joinID
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | project InstanceName = name, Edition = tostring(properties.edition), machineId
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| summarize Instances = count() by Edition
content.title: Instance Editions

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend joinID = toupper(id)
| project joinID
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | project InstanceName = name, Version = tostring(properties.version), machineId
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| summarize Instances = count() by Version
content.title: Instance Versions

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend joinID = toupper(id)
| project joinID
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | project InstanceName = name, LicenseType = tostring(properties.licenseType), machineId
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| summarize Instances = count() by LicenseType
content.title: License Types

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend joinID = toupper(id)
| project joinID
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | project InstanceId = id, InstanceName = name, Version = tostring(properties.version), machineId
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| join kind = inner (
resources
| where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances/databases" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| where name !in ("master", "model", "msdb", "tempdb")
| project InstanceId = substring(id, 0, indexof(id, "Databases", 0) - 1), DatabaseName = name, CompatibilityLevel = tostring(properties.compatibilityLevel)
) on InstanceId
| project InstanceName
| summarize count() by InstanceName
content.title: Number of databases per Instance

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend joinID = toupper(id)
| project joinID
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | project ResourceId = toupper(id), InstanceName = name, properties = tostring(properties), tags, ResourceGroup = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/',resourceGroup), Subscription = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId), machineId
    | extend parsedProperties = parse_json(properties)
    ) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
    | project
        ResourceId,
        InstanceName = tostring(parsedProperties.instanceName),
        Version = tostring(parsedProperties.version),
        Edition = tostring(parsedProperties.edition),
        BuildNumber = tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel),
        LicenseType = tostring(parsedProperties.licenseType),
        vCores = tostring(parsedProperties.vCore),
        Collation = tostring(parsedProperties.collation),
        MainstreamSupportEndDate = case(
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '11', '2017-07-11',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '12', '2019-07-09',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '13', '2021-07-13',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '14', '2022-10-11',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '15', '2025-02-28',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '16', '2028-01-11',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '17', '2030-10-14',
            'Unknown'),
        ExtendedSupportEndDate = case(
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '11', '2022-07-12',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '12', '2024-07-09',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '13', '2026-07-14',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '14', '2027-10-12',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '15', '2030-01-08',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '16', '2033-01-11',
            substring(tostring(parsedProperties.patchLevel), 0, 2) == '17', '2035-10-14',
            'Unknown'),
        EsuStatus = tostring(parsedProperties.esuStatus),
        Subscription, ResourceGroup
content.title: Instance details

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines" and properties['detectedProperties']['mssqldiscovered'] == "true" and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})) and tostring(tags['sqlmanaged']) != 'false'
| extend
    joinID = toupper(id),
    ConnectedMachineProxy = parse_json(properties.agentConfiguration.proxyUrl),
    OsType = tostring(properties.osType)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions" and name in ("WindowsAgent.SqlServer", "LinuxAgent.SqlServer") and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        SQLExtensionStatus = parse_json(properties).provisioningState,
        esuLastUpdate = todatetime(parse_json(properties).settings.esuLastUpdatedTimestamp),
        LicenseType = parse_json(properties.settings.LicenseType),
        Version = tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion)
    | project machineId, name, SQLExtensionStatus, esuLastUpdate, LicenseType, Version
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions" and name in ("AzureMonitorWindowsAgent", "AzureMonitorLinuxAgent") and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | extend machineId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        MonitoringAgentStatus = parse_json(properties).provisioningState,
        MonitoringAgentProxy = parse_json(properties.settings.proxy.address)
    | project machineId, name, MonitoringAgentStatus, MonitoringAgentProxy
) on $left.joinID == $right.machineId
| project id, OsType, Connected = tostring(properties.status), LicenseType
, SQLExtensionStatus = iif(isnull(SQLExtensionStatus), "Missing", tostring(SQLExtensionStatus)), Version
, MonitoringAgentStatus = iif(isnull(MonitoringAgentStatus), "Missing", tostring(MonitoringAgentStatus))
, ProxyConsistencyCheck = iff(
    iif(isempty(tostring(MonitoringAgentProxy)), "No", tostring(MonitoringAgentProxy))
    == iif(isempty(tostring(ConnectedMachineProxy)), "No", tostring(ConnectedMachineProxy)),
    true, false)
, esuLastUpdate
, resourceGroup = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup)
, subscriptionId = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId)
| extend ErrorsCheck = iff(Connected == "Connected", 0, 1)
    + iif(tostring(LicenseType) in ('Paid', 'PAYG', 'LicenseOnly'), 0, 1)
    + iif(tostring(SQLExtensionStatus) == "Succeeded", 0, 1)
    + iif(tostring(MonitoringAgentStatus) == "Succeeded", 0, 1)
    + iif(ProxyConsistencyCheck == true, 0, 1)
| where ErrorsCheck >= {ErrorsCheck}
| order by id asc
content.title: List of ARC machines with SQL Server installed

parameters.name: LogAnalyticsWorkspace
parameters.description: Choose all Log Analytics Workspaces to analyze BPA results in one place
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project WorkspaceId = id, WorkspaceName = name, subscriptionId
| join kind = inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on $left.subscriptionId == $right.subscriptionId
| join kind = inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
    and ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on $left.subscriptionId == $right.subscriptionId
| project value = WorkspaceId, label = WorkspaceName, group = subscriptionName
| distinct value, label, group

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData), resourceGroup = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/", 4)[0])
| where ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| distinct _ResourceId = toupper(_ResourceId), InstanceName = tostring(asmt[11]), AsmtTime = todatetime(asmt[0]), AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1])
, BPAlink = 
        iff(toupper(asmt[11]) == 'MSSQLSERVER',
        strcat(toupper(replace_string(toupper(_ResourceId), 'HYBRIDCOMPUTE/MACHINES', 'AzureArcData/SqlServerInstances'))),
        strcat(toupper(replace_string(toupper(_ResourceId), 'HYBRIDCOMPUTE/MACHINES', 'AzureArcData/SqlServerInstances')), '_', toupper(asmt[11])))
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| summarize AsmtTime = strcat(format_datetime(max(AsmtTime), 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm tt'), ' UTC'), count() by _ResourceId, InstanceName, AsmtId, BPAlink
| summarize LastRunTime = arg_max(AsmtTime, AsmtId), TotalRuns = count() by _ResourceId, InstanceName, BPAlink
| sort by _ResourceId asc, InstanceName asc
content.title: BPA runs on each server

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData), resourceGroup = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/", 4)[0])
| where ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| extend
    AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]),
    CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]),
    DisplayString=asmt[3],
    Description=tostring(asmt[4]),
    HelpLink=asmt[5],
    TargetType=case(asmt[6] == 1, "Server", asmt[6] == 2, "Database", ""),
    TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), 
    Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed"),
    Message=tostring(asmt[9]),
    TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| order by CheckId, _ResourceId
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0
| summarize count() by Severity, Sev
| order by Sev
| project Severity, Count = count_
content.title: Issues by severity

parameters.name: filterTags
parameters.label: Tags
parameters.query:
let SeverityFilter = dynamic([{severity}]);
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData), resourceGroup = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/", 4)[0])
| where ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]), 
TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","), Sev = toint(asmt[8]), TargetType=toint(asmt[6]), TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), Message=tostring(asmt[9]), CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]), Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed")
| where isnotempty(AsmtId) and Sev >= 0 and Severity in (SeverityFilter)
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| mv-expand TagsArr
| where TagsArr != 'DefaultRuleset'
| project Tag = tostring(TagsArr), TargetType, TargetName, Message, Sev, CheckId
| distinct * 
| summarize Cnt = count() by Tag
| order by Cnt desc
| project value = Tag, label = strcat(Tag, ' (', Cnt, ')')

content.query:
let SeverityFilter = dynamic([{severity}]);
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData), resourceGroup = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/", 4)[0])
| where ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| extend
    AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]),
    CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]),
    DisplayString=asmt[3],
    Description=tostring(asmt[4]),
    HelpLink=asmt[5],
    TargetType=case(asmt[6] == 1, "Server", asmt[6] == 2, "Database", ""),
    TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), 
    Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed"),
    Message=tostring(asmt[9]),
    TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| order by CheckId, _ResourceId
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| where Severity in (SeverityFilter) and TargetType == "Server"
    and (array_length(set_intersect(TagsArr, dynamic([{filterTags}]))) > 0 or "{filterTags}" == "'*'")
| order by Sev, CheckId
| summarize count() by TargetName
content.title: Issues by server
content.noDataMessage: No result with the selected Severity

let SeverityFilter = dynamic([{severity}]);
SqlAssessment_CL

content.query:
let SeverityFilter = dynamic([{severity}]);
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData), resourceGroup = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/", 4)[0])
| where ('*' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup}))
| extend
    AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]),
    CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]),
    DisplayString=asmt[3],
    Description=tostring(asmt[4]),
    HelpLink=asmt[5],
    TargetType=case(asmt[6] == 1, "Server", asmt[6] == 2, "Database", ""),
    TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), 
    Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed"),
    Message=tostring(asmt[9]),
    TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| order by CheckId, _ResourceId
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0 and Severity in (SeverityFilter)
    and (array_length(set_intersect(TagsArr, dynamic([{filterTags}]))) > 0 or "{filterTags}" == "'*'")
| project Sev, CheckId, Description, _ResourceId, Severity, TargetType, TargetName, Tags=strcat_array(array_slice(TagsArr, 1, -1), ', ')
| summarize count() by Sev, Severity, TargetType, Tags, CheckId, Description
| project Sev, Severity, TargetType, Tags, CheckId, Description, count_
| order by Sev, TargetType, CheckId asc
content.title: Check summary
content.noDataMessage: No result with the selected Severity

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend
    AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]),
    CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]),
    DisplayString=asmt[3],
    Description=tostring(asmt[4]),
    HelpLink=asmt[5],
    TargetType=case(asmt[6] == 1, "Server", asmt[6] == 2, "Database", ""),
    TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), 
    Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed"),
    Message=tostring(asmt[9]),
    TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| order by CheckId, _ResourceId
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0 and CheckId == "{CheckId}" 
| project _ResourceId, TargetName=case(TargetType == "Server", TargetName, TargetType == "Database", split(TargetName,":")[1], "")
| summarize count() by _ResourceId
| order by _ResourceId
content.title: Check details

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend
    AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1]),
    CheckId=tostring(asmt[2]),
    DisplayString=asmt[3],
    Description=tostring(asmt[4]),
    HelpLink=asmt[5],
    TargetType=case(asmt[6] == 1, "Server", asmt[6] == 2, "Database", ""),
    TargetName=tostring(asmt[7]), 
    Severity=case(asmt[8] == 30, "High", asmt[8] == 20, "Medium", asmt[8] == 10, "Low", asmt[8] == 0, "Information", asmt[8] == 1, "Warning", asmt[8] == 2, "Critical", "Passed"),
    Message=tostring(asmt[9]),
    TagsArr=split(tostring(asmt[10]), ","),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| where isnotempty(AsmtId)
| order by CheckId, _ResourceId
| join kind=inner
    (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId=tostring(asmt[1])
    | where isnotempty(AsmtId)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
    ) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0
| project _ResourceId, TargetType, TargetName=case(TargetType == "Server", TargetName, TargetType == "Database", split(TargetName,":")[1], ""), Severity, Message, Tags=strcat_array(array_slice(TagsArr, 1, -1), ', '), CheckId, Description, HelpLink = tostring(HelpLink)
| where CheckId == "{CheckId}" and _ResourceId == "{_ResourceId}" 
| order by TargetName asc
